message:
feat(runtime): implement event_log and snapshot APIs

Provide the missing implementations behind event.h and snapshot.h:

event_log.c — operation-level event recording with FNV-1a hash chain
  - Fixed-capacity ring buffer storing (kind, entity, parent, seq, status)
  - Running FNV-1a hash over (kind, entity, sequence) for replay integrity
  - JSON serialization and event-by-event replay verification
  - 18 unit tests covering emission, read-back, hash determinism,
    kind-string table, JSON output, and replay divergence detection

snapshot.c — deterministic point-in-time runtime state capture
  - Walks live regions, tasks, and obligations into a flat struct
  - Captures trace digest for cross-run equivalence checking
  - JSON serialization and field-by-field equality comparison
  - 14 unit tests covering init, capture, equality, determinism,
    and JSON output

Both modules are added to the Makefile RUNTIME_SRC list so they
link into the static library.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -147,7 +147,9 @@ RUNTIME_SRC := \
 	src/runtime/vertical_adapter.c \
 	src/runtime/virtual_time.c \
 	src/runtime/config_reload.c \
-	src/runtime/regression_localize.c
+	src/runtime/regression_localize.c \
+	src/runtime/event_log.c \
+	src/runtime/snapshot.c
 
 CHANNEL_SRC := \
 	src/channel/mpsc.c
